mapper.select: SELECT * FROM contract_sales WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contract_sales (project_id, contract_name, customer_agency, contract_amount, accumulated_progress, memo) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{contractName}, #{customerAgency}, #{contractAmount}, #{accumulatedProgress}, #{memo})
mapper.update: UPDATE contract_sales SET contract_name = #{contractName}, customer_agency = #{customerAgency}, contract_amount = #{contractAmount}, accumulated_progress = #{accumulatedProgress}, memo = #{memo} WHERE id = #{id} AND project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM contract_sales WHERE id = #{id} AND project_id = #{projectId}
